entries.text: I am Kim Young Hee, who is currently working as a assistant at Eminent
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Hospice for 6 months.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: My husband, who had a bad liver, was discharged on April 15th.

entries.text: 그런데 지금은 아주 많이 친해졌어요. 가끔 우울증도 겪으시지만 지금은 아주 웃으면서 소통을 해요.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 또 치매가 심해서 모두들 힘들어하는 환자분들도 그분들의 정서 상태에 공감을 하면서 함께 해드리면 차츰
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 적응하면서 고맙다고 할 때는 정말 가슴이 찡해요.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 그래서 따라서 신뢰를 바탕으로 서로 위로와 사랑 가운데 환자분들이 평화남을 느낄 때가 가장 보람된다고 생각합니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 저희 남편이나 엘리 가신 아버님처럼 보통 사람들은 대부분 호스피스에 대해서 잘 모르는 것 같습니다. 저도 그랬으니까요.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 그런데 제 경험상 이렇게 도움이 사실이 필요하신 분들이 많으실 것 같습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 지금 바로 엠리드 호스피스에 연락을 주시고 도움을 받으세요.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 저는 제가 받은 여러 가지 많은 도움들을 조금이라도 보답하려고 제가 시간과 건강이 허락하는 한
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 필요하신 분들에게 많은 도움을 최대한 드리려고 노력하고 있습니다. 감사합니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.
